name: Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons
author: Poki
description: Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons is an action platform role-playing game where you're a brave hero who has a trusty sword and a whole lotta apples. Explore a kingdom in a far away fantasy land where you can embark on heroic adventures. Discover magical forests and fight the spooky foes therein, collect gold and valuable gems from hidden dungeons, unlock exciting new outfits, and defeat every tough boss the game makes you face. Jump, dash, swing, throw apples, do whatever it takes to complete Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons and unlock every secret in the game. How to play Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons? Move - WASD or Arrow keys Jump - Z or J or Space Attack - X or K or Control Dash - V or ; or Alt Throw apples - C or L or Shift Who created Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons? Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons is created by Limitless. They have another game on Poki: Apple Knight , Apple Knight: Fight , and Viking Village ! How can I play Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons for free? You can play Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons for free on Poki. Can I play Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons on mobile devices and desktop? Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
